sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (event_date DateTime64(3) DEFAULT parseDateTime64BestEffortUS('12/15/2021 10:30:00 AM'));
UPDATE test_dates SET event_date = parseDateTime64BestEffortUS('01/01/2022 12:00:00 AM') WHERE event_date < parseDateTime64BestEffortUS('01/01/2022 00:00:00 AM');
SELECT event_date, parseDateTime64BestEffortUS('06/30/2023') AS parsed_date FROM test_dates WHERE event_date < parseDateTime64BestEffortUS('07/01/2023');
INSERT INTO test_dates (event_date) VALUES (parseDateTime64BestEffortUS('02/28/2019 06:45:00 PM')), (parseDateTime64BestEffortUS('03/05/2019 01:00:00 AM'));
